item.title: dotnet: .NET and .NET Framework June 2026 servicing releases updates
item.description:
This post is a brief recap of the June 2026 servicing updates for .NET and .NET Framework. The provided content does not include specific version numbers, fixes, or security details.

  • Source: .NET
